summary: Comprehensive e2e testing of Madio Doors & Windows catalogue app. Backend APIs all pass (13/13). Frontend UI fully functional - all features tested including home page, catalogue with filters, product modal with WhatsApp button, 3 theme toggling, admin brochure generator with PIN auth, A4 brochure preview, about page, contact form submission, and navigation.

issues: Address shows verbose format (Shilpa Layout, Weaker Section Colony, Izzathnagar, Shilpa Hills) - minor mismatch but functionally fine

critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') — should use lifespan context manager in FastAPI 0.95+
Console warnings about CSS border property conflicts in BrochurePreview.js (borderLeft vs border shorthand)
seed_data_creation: 18 products seeded in MongoDB on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified: (1) Home page with hero, features strip, category cards, stats, CTA - all present. (2) Catalogue page with 18 products, category filters (All/Sliding/Casement/Partition/Hardware) working, search filtering working. (3) Product modal opens with specs, features, and WhatsApp enquiry button (wa.me link). (4) Theme picker FAB at bottom-right toggles between 3 themes: Sleek Modern (charcoal+gold), Clean Minimalist (white+navy), Bold Industrial (black+orange). (5) Admin page (/admin) requires PIN 'MADIO24', shows brochure generator with theme selection, cover customization, product selection. (6) Brochure preview (/brochure-preview) shows A4 pages with Print/Save PDF button. (7) About page has mission/vision/values. (8) Contact page has form that submits successfully. (9) Navigation between all pages works. (10) No NHPC branding anywhere - all Madio branding.

catalogue_page.category_filters: PASS - All(18), Sliding(7), Casement(2), Partition(8), Hardware(1)
